description: Fleet Registration — processes bulk vehicle registration for government and commercial fleets, IRP/IFTA compliance, and apportioned plates

hard_stops.label: IRP Account Not in Good Standing
hard_stops.logic: International Registration Plan account has outstanding balances or suspended status — fleet registration blocked

hard_stops.label: USDOT Number Invalid
hard_stops.logic: Fleet USDOT number is inactive, revoked, or not found in FMCSA SAFER database — commercial fleet registration requires active authority

hard_stops.label: Insurance Below Federal Minimum
hard_stops.logic: Fleet liability insurance is below FMCSA minimum financial responsibility requirements (49 CFR 387)

soft_flags.label: Large Fleet Discount Eligible
soft_flags.logic: Fleet has more than 50 vehicles — may qualify for bulk registration discount program
